aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are likely to cite TemperaturePro due to their strong local presence and decent content, but improvements in schema markup and conversational content are needed to solidify their position.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema to highlight common customer queries.
Enhance content with more conversational language focused on user intent.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a high rating, numerous photos, and accurate information.
critical_issues: No recent posts to engage with potential customers.
Q&A section is underutilized and lacks detailed responses.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly audit citations to ensure ongoing accuracy.

schema_gaps: Missing HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance tasks.
FAQPage schema is not fully utilized for customer questions.
LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed service information.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to specific HVAC maintenance tasks and troubleshooting.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage and HowTo schema to capture long-tail queries.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as HVAC experts through detailed content and media mentions.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for conversational search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Missing out on 40% of potential leads from AI assistants like ChatGPT and Claude.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their GBP is strong, but AI models overlook them due to insufficient schema and conversational content.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates advanced schema, conversational content, and authority signals to make TemperaturePro the go-to HVAC expert for AI assistants.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search—act now to secure your market position.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads with Our AEO Strategy
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI-driven search.
page_title: TemperaturePro | Columbus Heating & Air Conditioning Company
